response:
TEMPERATURE IS A MEASURE OF HEAT IN SYSTEMS.
SUN SHINES AND SPARKS SPREAD SPARKS.
STARS SHINE IN SKIES.
SAND SPARKLES IN SUN.
SILENT SNOW STOPS STORMS.
SWEET SUGAR SPILLS.
SLOW STEPS SINK IN SOIL.
SAD SOULS SEEK SHELTER.
SILVER SNAKES SLIDE.
SEAS SURGE AND SWELL.
SHADOWS STRETCH.
ROLL SLOWLY NOW.
